NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_UNMANAGED
NMDeviceState.description: the device is recognized, but not managed by NetworkManager

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_UNAVAILABLE
NMDeviceState.description: the device is managed by NetworkManager, but is not available for use. Reasons may include the wireless switched off, missing firmware, no ethernet carrier, missing supplicant or modem manager, etc.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_DISCONNECTED
NMDeviceState.description: the device can be activated, but is currently idle and not connected to a network.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_PREPARE
NMDeviceState.description: the device is preparing the connection to the network. This may include operations like changing the MAC address, setting physical link properties, and anything else required to connect to the requested network.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_CONFIG
NMDeviceState.description: the device is connecting to the requested network. This may include operations like associating with the WiFi AP, dialing the modem, connecting to the remote Bluetooth device, etc.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_NEED_AUTH
NMDeviceState.description: the device requires more information to continue connecting to the requested network. This includes secrets like WiFi passphrases, login passwords, PIN codes, etc.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_IP_CONFIG
NMDeviceState.description: the device is requesting IPv4 and/or IPv6 addresses and routing information from the network.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_IP_CHECK
NMDeviceState.description: the device is checking whether further action is required for the requested network connection. This may include checking whether only local network access is available, whether a captive portal is blocking access to the Internet, etc.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_SECONDARIES
NMDeviceState.description: the device is waiting for a secondary connection (like a VPN) which must activated before the device can be activated

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_ACTIVATED
NMDeviceState.description: the device has a network connection, either local or global.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_DEACTIVATING
NMDeviceState.description: a disconnection from the current network connection was requested, and the device is cleaning up resources used for that connection. The network connection may still be valid.

NMDeviceState.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_FAILED
NMDeviceState.description: the device failed to connect to the requested network and is cleaning up the connection request

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_CONFIG_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The device could not be readied for configuration

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_IP_CONFIG_UNAVAILABLE
NMDeviceStateReason.description: IP configuration could not be reserved (no available address, timeout, etc)

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_IP_CONFIG_EXPIRED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The IP config is no longer valid

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_NO_SECRETS
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Secrets were required, but not provided

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_SUPPLICANT_TIMEOUT
NMDeviceStateReason.description: 802.1x supplicant took too long to authenticate

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_SHARED_START_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Shared connection service failed to start

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_GSM_APN_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Failed to select the specified APN

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_GSM_REGISTRATION_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Failed to register with the requested network

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_FIRMWARE_MISSING
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Necessary firmware for the device may be missing

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_USER_REQUESTED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Device disconnected by user or client

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_CONNECTION_ASSUMED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The device's existing connection was assumed

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_MODEM_NOT_FOUND
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The modem could not be found

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_BT_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The Bluetooth connection failed or timed out

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_GSM_SIM_NOT_INSERTED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: GSM Modem's SIM Card not inserted

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_INFINIBAND_MODE
NMDeviceStateReason.description: InfiniBand device does not support connected mode

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_DEPENDENCY_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: A dependency of the connection failed

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_BR2684_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Problem with the RFC 2684 Ethernet over ADSL bridge

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_SSID_NOT_FOUND
NMDeviceStateReason.description: The WiFi network could not be found

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_SECONDARY_CONNECTION_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: A secondary connection of the base connection failed

NMDeviceStateReason.name: NM_DEVICE_STATE_REASON_MODEM_FAILED
NMDeviceStateReason.description: Modem failed or no longer available
